name: RedDoorz Syariah near Danau Lut Tawar Takengon

reviews.reviewComments: The staff are friendly and helpful. Rooms are quite old with no hot water. Overall it's OK to stay in this hotel.

reviews.originalComment:
Kamar bersih
Tp beberapa ada yg rusak spt lemari tidak ada pintunya terus kamar mandi pintunya susah dikunci terus jendela kamar tidak bisa dikunci.
Selain bagus lokasi tengah kota..
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, but some things are damaged, like the wardrobe which has no door, the bathroom door is difficult to lock, and the bedroom window cannot be locked. Apart from that, the location is great in the city center.

reviews.reviewNegatives: The toilet was not properly cleaned, and the toilet door needed to repaired

reviews.originalComment: Pesan di agoda utl kamar family room dg fasilitas 1 ranjang queen n 1 ranjang twin,,pas check in d ksi kamar double twin,😫 ud komplain k reddorz nya ktnya emg bookingan nya ud sesuai,ud ak jelasin smpai ad bukti dr agoda aku emg psan yg family room tp kta yg pnya yg msuk k sistem mreka kmar yg twin bed itu,dstu aku komplain k agoda tp gk ad kejelasan,,sumpah bad service emg 👎🏻
reviews.reviewComments: I booked a family room on Agoda with facilities of 1 queen bed and 1 twin bed, but upon check-in, I was given a double twin room. 😫 I complained to the management, and they said that the booking was indeed correct. I explained everything and even provided proof from Agoda that I had booked the family room, but the staff said that the twin bed room had entered their system. I then complained to Agoda, but there was no clarity. I swear it's really bad service 👎🏻.

reviews.reviewTitle: Very unpleasant stay. Not recommended at all.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Room - smelly, gloomy and no ventilation
Cabinet - dusty, no hanger, broken parts
Only 1 single switch to control light and other socket- very unpractical
Toilet - no tap at sink, no shower tap, floor very dusty looks like no maintenance from the staff.

reviews.reviewTitle: I cannot check in at the property.
reviews.originalTitle: Saya tidak bisa check in di properti
reviews.originalComment: Saya pesan 2 kamar untuk 1 malam di properti ini melalui Agoda, namun saya sangat kecewa dengan AGODA, saya dan keluarga tiba di properti jam 00.15 wib, namun tidak ada pesanan dari Agoda nama saya pada sistem properti dan sama sama dengan petugas resepsionis saya melihat pada sistem mereka memang benar benar Agoda tidak melakukan pemesanan pada properti atas nama saya, sementara konfirmasi pembayaran dan Booking ID dari Agoda saya sudah terima. Mohon Agoda bertanggung jawab untuk kembalikan uang saya sejumlah yang saya bayarkan..
reviews.reviewComments: I booked 2 rooms for 1 night at this property through Agoda, but I am very disappointed with Agoda. My family and I arrived at the property at 00:15 WIB, but there was no reservation under my name in the system at the property. Together with the receptionist, I checked their system and it is indeed true that Agoda did not make a reservation at the property under my name, while I have already received the payment confirmation and Booking ID from Agoda. I request Agoda to be responsible and refund the amount I paid.

reviews.originalComment: Kali ini saya benar2 kecewa booking hotel di agoda...pembayaran sudah berhasil..dan sudah dikonfirmasi..ketika sampai dihotel mau chek in pihak hotel berkata sudah penuh...di kasi solusi dan ditawarkan kamar yang tidak sesuai yang dipesan....ketika saya mau refund dan ubah tanggal bookingan tidak bisa...
reviews.reviewComments: This time I am truly disappointed with my hotel booking on Agoda... the payment was successful and confirmed... when I arrived at the hotel to check in, the hotel staff said it was fully booked... they offered a solution with a room that did not match my reservation... when I wanted to get a refund and change the booking date, it couldn't be done...
The staff are friendly and helpful. Rooms are quite old with no hot water. Overall it's OK to stay in this hotel.

reviews.originalComment:
Kamar bersih
Tp beberapa ada yg rusak spt lemari tidak ada pintunya terus kamar mandi pintunya susah dikunci terus jendela kamar tidak bisa dikunci.
Selain bagus lokasi tengah kota..

reviews.reviewNegatives: The toilet was not properly cleaned, and the toilet door needed to repaired

reviews.originalComment:
Berbeda dengan gambar, yg dipesan family room dg kasur queen size+small size, yg tercatat di sistemnya katanya twin size 😂
Enak .. air panasnya lancar
reviews.reviewComments: Unlike the picture, which ordered a family room with a queen size bed + small size, it was recorded in the system as twin size 😂 It's nice .. the hot water works well.

Gambar tidak sama dg kamar sebenarnya. Sangat jauh berbeda. Kamar tidak ada jendela, bau, apek, staff tidak ramah. Air panas jam 8 pagi tiba2 mati. Anak2 terpaksa menjerit dimandikan dg air dingin. Selimut seperti tidak dicuci, aroma nya benar2 tdk menyenangkan. Cukup pertama dan terakhir kemari, walalupun hanya istirahat sebentar.

Bisa dibilang pemilik Hotelnya sangat baik hati. Sy check in lewat agoda hampir jam 00, karema sy dan anak anak baru turun dari Burni Telong di Bener Meriah pk 22. Langsung menuju Takengon. Ketika sy OK di agoda, sudah lewat jam 00, itu artinya sy melakukan order utk keesokan hari nya. Tp ownernya sangat berbaik hati utk tetap menerima sy agar bs bermalam disini. Resepsionist ramah. Kamar luas dan bersih. Dan yg paling penting, air panasnya lancar. Alhamdulillah

reviews.reviewTitle: Tempat menginap keluarga dekat dengan daerah wisata
reviews.reviewComments: jarak yang cukup dekat dengandaerah wisata danau lut tawar dan pantan terong
